skos:definition.@value: to call, hold, consider, regard as
to state or declare with reference to
Jmd oder Etwas; irgendwie; nennen, Jmd oder Etwas; für Jmd oder Etwas; halten, ansehen, erklären
Jmd; Etwas; zusprechen, Etwas für Jmdes Eigenthum erklären
gegen Jmd; sprechen, Jmd Unrecht geben
umher,; der Reihe nach oder zusammen sagen

@graph.rdf:value:
<L>21629<pc>124,1<k1>ah<k2>ah<h>1<e>1
<hom>1.</hom> <s>ah</s> ¦ (<ab>defect.</ab> verb, only <ab>perf.</ab> 3. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>A/ha</s> and 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>Ahu/H</s>, <ls>RV.</ls>; <ls>AV.</ls> &c., 2. <ab>sg.</ab> <s>AtTa</s>, <ls>ŚBr. xiv</ls> (<ls>BṛĀrUp.</ls>), <ls>N.</ls>; <ls>Ragh. iii, 48</ls> 3. <ab>du.</ab> <s>AhatuH</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. viii, 2, 35</ls>)
<div n="to"/>to say, speak, <ls>RV.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/> (with lexicographers) to express, signify;
<div n="to"/>to call (by name, <s>nAmnA</s>), <ls>MBh. iii, 16065</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to call, hold, consider, regard as (with two <ab>acc.</ab>, for one of which may be substituted a phrase with <s>iti</s>), <ls>RV.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to state or declare with reference to (<ab>acc.</ab>), <ls>BṛĀrUp.</ls>; <ls>Śak.</ls>; <ls>Megh.</ls>;
<div n="to"/>to acknowledge, accept, state, <ls>AitBr.</ls>; <ls>Mn.</ls> &c.;
<div n="to"/>to adjudge anything (<ab>acc.</ab>) to any one (<ab>gen.</ab>), <ls>Mn. ix, 44.</ls> <info whitneyroots="ah,6"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp=""/>
<LEND>
